rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is wholly unrelated to Educ. Code §22.05121, which governs educator immunity from disciplinary proceedings. No overlap in subject matter, operative effect, or cross-references exists.
quote: A professional employee of a school district may not be subject to disciplinary proceedings for
_note: No conflict. The rule_text concerns educator employment immunity; the proposed change concerns property tax exemptions. No statutory or operational intersection.
